overview_summary: The profiled neighboring landowner has not expressed any public stance regarding new development, with their position remaining unknown. They also do not hold a notable role or influence in the community, indicating a low overall risk from influential opposition.

neighbors.name: John Barnes & Shelley Barnes
neighbors.claims: John and Shelley Barnes jointly own a parcel of land in Cochise County, Arizona, identified as Assessor’s Parcel Number 106-48-003 ([parcelinquirytreasurer.cochise.az.gov](https://parcelinquirytreasurer.cochise.az.gov/Parcel/TaxSummary#:~:text=Welcome%20to%20the%20new%20Cochise,and%20address%2C%20view%20area%20code)). No references to John or Shelley Barnes were found in available local government records or media, and they have not publicly engaged on energy or development issues ([www.cochise.az.gov](https://www.cochise.az.gov/611/Board-of-Adjustment#:~:text=Board%20of%20Adjustment%20,Consider%20zoning%20variances)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage with the Barnes household through a friendly, informal introduction to understand any concerns. Emphasize general community benefits and address common issues (e.g., property values, safety) since they have no stated position.
